name: vedaai-assessment-creator
description: AI Assessment Creator built for the VedaAI internship assignment.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run start -w apps/web"
